scriptText:
II. [002] SH003

[[STAGING]]
[[IMAGE PROMPT]]
Create a striking cinematic shot from a sci-fi mystery film where a vast desert is filled with thousands of levitating, perfectly still river stones.

Analyze the provided reference image. Extract the subject's core identity, facial structure, and physical proportions to function as the Actor for this scene. Seamlessly integrate this subject into the new environment described below, ensuring that the lighting, perspective, and clothing logic adhere to the new setting while maintaining the subject's likeness.

Follow the detailed visual breakdown below:

> SUBJECT & ACTION
Character: Wearing a dusty, oversized linen trench coat and dark trousers.
Movement: Walking slowly through the field of floating stones, carefully avoiding them as if they are fragile.
Expression: Curious and cautious, eyes scanning the floating horizon.

> SPATIAL LAYOUT (DEPTH)
Foreground: Several large, smooth river stones floating inches from the lens, creating a sense of immersion and physical scale.
Middle Ground: The character navigating through a dense cluster of floating rocks that hover at various heights from knee-level to head-level.
Background: An endless, flat salt-pan desert under a scorching midday sun, with heat waves distorting the distant mountains.

> LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE
Key Light: Harsh, high-noon vertical sunlight creating small, sharp shadows directly beneath the floating stones on the ground.
Ambient/Fill: Intense white bounce-light from the salt-flat floor illuminating the character's chin and neck.
Atmospherics: Extremely clear air with shimmering heat distortion in the far background.

> CAMERA & TECHNICAL
Shot Size: Low-angle wide shot, emphasizing the height of the floating stones relative to the character.
Lens Characteristics: 21mm wide-angle lens, deep focus from foreground stones to the horizon.
Texture: High-contrast digital cinematography, razor-sharp textures, vivid color saturation.
[[/IMAGE PROMPT]]
[[/STAGING]]

From the opening wide shot, the man walks with a heavy, deliberate pace. The camera performs a smooth orbital move, spiraling downward to a low-angle perspective while maintaining a fixed distance. Then, a sharp cut to a cowboy shot from a side profile; the man’s lips move as he whispers "What is this place?" with an awe-struck tone. After the dialogue, the camera cuts back to a full-body wide shot. As the man stops walking, the floating stones begin to ascend vertically until they align with his head. Simultaneously, the camera performs a crane-up to a high-angle, making the man appear small in the vast desert. @Image1 @Element1

III. [003] SH006

[[STAGING]]
[[IMAGE PROMPT]]
Create a gritty, visceral cinematic still of a character sprinting through a collapsing, burning industrial warehouse.

Analyze the provided reference image. Extract the subject's core identity, facial structure, and physical proportions to function as the Actor for this scene. Seamlessly integrate this subject into the new environment described below, ensuring that the lighting, perspective, and clothing logic adhere to the new setting while maintaining the subject's likeness.

Follow the detailed visual breakdown below:

> SUBJECT & ACTION
Character: Wearing a sweat-soaked dark navy henley shirt, rugged tactical trousers, and a holster rig across his chest.
Movement: A powerful, low-center-of-gravity sprint, vaulting over a fallen flaming beam while shielding his face from the heat.
Expression: A mix of pain and raw determination, sweat and soot streaking across his forehead.

> SPATIAL LAYOUT (DEPTH)
Foreground: Massive sparks and burning embers flying directly toward the lens, creating a sense of immediate danger.
Middle Ground: The protagonist interacting with the environment, his hand pressing off a scorched metal crate as he maneuvers.
Background: A chaotic perspective of collapsing steel rafters, thick black smoke, and roaring orange fire.

> LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE
Key Light: Harsh, flickering orange and red light from the explosions, creating high-contrast rim lighting on the character's profile.
Ambient/Fill: Deep, heavy shadows filled with thick smoke.
Atmospherics: Volumetric fire, floating ash, and a dense heat-haze that distorts the background.

> CAMERA & TECHNICAL
Shot Size: Medium-wide tracking shot, side profile view.
Lens Characteristics: 35mm anamorphic lens, slight horizontal lens flares from the fire, shallow depth of field.
Texture: Arri Alexa digital cinema look, high dynamic range, heavy film grain to enhance the grittiness.
[[/IMAGE PROMPT]]
[[/STAGING]]

A high-intensity one-shot tracking take. The camera starts in a Medium Shot, perfectly synchronized to the man's sprinting pace with a raw handheld shake. [Audio: Deep bass rumble of a collapsing building, crackling fire, and heavy, rapid boots].As he runs, he begins to wheeze with exhaustion. [Character: The Survivor, raspy trembling voice]: “Come on... just a little further!”Immediately, a massive steel girder slams into the ground in front of him with a deafening [Sound Effect: Metallic crash]. The camera orbits 180 degrees around his side as he performs a desperate sliding maneuver to avoid the debris. His face is illuminated by the orange glow of the fire.Without cutting, the camera pulls back (Dolly-out) into a Wide Shot, revealing the scale of the collapsing warehouse behind him as he reaches the blinding light of the exit. The soundscape transitions from the roar of the fire to the sudden, muffled silence of the outdoors.

IV. [004] SH019

[[STAGING]]
[[IMAGE PROMPT]]
Create a poignant cinematic shot from a drama about the Indonesian 'Mudik' homecoming, set in a crowded, old-fashioned train station.

Apply the facial identity from the reference image to the protagonist. Project the character’s physical likeness onto a full-body figure that matches the scale and perspective of the environment. Synthesize a weathered travel outfit including a simple olive-green field jacket and a large, worn-out canvas backpack resting at his feet.

Follow the detailed visual breakdown below:

> SUBJECT & ACTION
Character: Leaning against a massive, peeling concrete pillar on the station platform.
Movement: Looking at a crumpled paper ticket in his hand while everyone else is rushing toward the boarding gate.
Expression: A candid moment of hesitation and profound loneliness, feeling like a stranger in his own country.
Interaction: He is a fixed point of stillness as a blur of families carrying large 'kardus' boxes and bags rushes past him toward the train.

> SPATIAL LAYOUT (DEPTH)
Foreground: The edge of a rusted iron bench and a discarded 'kretek' cigarette pack on the ground.
Middle Ground: The protagonist and the massive concrete pillar providing a sense of scale.
Background: The long perspective of the train tracks and a vintage locomotive pulling into the station under a high steel roof.

> LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE
Key Light: The low, orange light of a tropical sunset hitting the station from a side-angle.
Ambient/Fill: Long, dramatic shadows stretching across the platform.
Atmospherics: Swirling dust in the sunbeams and a faint blue haze of diesel smoke from the train engine.

> CAMERA & TECHNICAL
Shot Size: Full wide shot, emphasizing the massive height of the colonial-era station ceiling compared to the man.
Lens Characteristics: 24mm wide-angle lens to capture the architectural lines and the flow of the crowd.
Texture: 16mm film aesthetic, warm highlights, slightly desaturated tones to emphasize the 'old-world' feel.
[[/IMAGE PROMPT]]
[[/STAGING]]

Steady tracking shot of  @Element1  maintaining a consistent distance as the tactical man  @Image1  runs toward the camera. he glances over his shoulder with a determined yet panicked expression. the camera then smoothly transitions into high-angle and god’s eye view, making the character look small. Finally, the scene cuts to a medium close-up of his face as he continues to run. Audio features the rhythmic steps and his ragged, heavy breathing. No music.

V. [005] SH007

[[STAGING]]
[[IMAGE PROMPT]]
Create a breathtaking cinematic still from a high-stakes mountain survival thriller.

Analyze the provided reference image. Extract the subject's core identity, facial structure, and physical proportions to function as the Actor for this scene. Seamlessly integrate this subject into the new environment described below, ensuring that the lighting, perspective, and clothing logic adhere to the new setting while maintaining the subject's likeness.

Follow the detailed visual breakdown below:

> SUBJECT & ACTION
Character: Wearing a heavily weathered, ice-caked technical parka with climbing harnesses and iron carabiners.
Movement: A desperate, muscular struggle as the character grips a jagged granite ledge with one hand, his other hand reaching for a hammered piton.
Expression: Gritty determination, teeth grit, eyes narrowed against the wind, sweat freezing on his brow.

> SPATIAL LAYOUT (DEPTH)
Foreground: The character's strained hand and forearms taking up the bottom of the frame, showing every vein and detail of the glove texture.
Middle Ground: The character hanging over a sheer vertical cliff face.
Background: A dizzying drop looking thousands of feet down into a swirling vortex of clouds and jagged mountain peaks below.

> LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE
Key Light: Harsh, cold sunlight reflecting off the white snow, creating high-contrast shadows on the character's face.
Ambient/Fill: Cool blue shadows within the rock crevices.
Atmospherics: Heavy spindrift snow blowing sideways across the frame, creating a sense of speed and danger.

> CAMERA & TECHNICAL
Shot Size: Extreme high-angle "Vertigo" shot, looking straight down past the character into the abyss.
Lens Characteristics: 24mm wide-angle lens to exaggerate the depth and height.
Texture: 70mm film stock, sharp detail, high dynamic range, intense cinematic grain.
[[/IMAGE PROMPT]]
[[/STAGING]]

A handheld shaky camera pushes into the climber's face as his hands tremble on the cliff edge. He bows his head in despair with eyes closed, then cuts to a side profile showing him fighting back tears. He suddenly looks forward with a determined scowl and lets out a powerful scream. Immediately cut to an extreme wide shot of his tiny silhouette against a massive, snowy mountain peak under a grey sky. Audio: Loud wind, heavy breathing, and a lone echoing scream. No music.

VI. [006] SH008

[[STAGING]]
[[IMAGE PROMPT]]
Create a high-octane cinematic action still of a tactical operative maneuvering through a rain-slicked urban warzone.

Analyze the provided reference image. Extract the subject's core identity, facial structure, and physical proportions to function as the Actor for this scene. Seamlessly integrate this subject into the new environment described below, ensuring that the lighting, perspective, and clothing logic adhere to the new setting while maintaining the subject's likeness.

Follow the detailed visual breakdown below:

> SUBJECT & ACTION
Character: Wearing a mud-splattered tactical vest, dark combat trousers, and wet combat boots.
Movement: Caught in a dynamic vault over a concrete barrier. One hand is planted on the wall, body angled mid-air, legs tucked for the landing.
Expression: Intense focus and "combat trance," eyes locked on a target off-camera, jaw clenched.

> SPATIAL LAYOUT (DEPTH)
Foreground: A shattered brick wall on the left side of the frame, providing a "dirty" foreground element for depth.
Middle Ground: The character mid-vault, suspended over a puddle of water that is splashing upward.
Background: A narrow city alleyway with overflowing dumpsters, flickering neon signs, and a distant black tactical van.

> LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE
Key Light: Cold, blue-hour twilight mixed with the sharp white light of an overhead streetlamp.
Ambient/Fill: Reflections of red and blue emergency lights in the puddles on the ground.
Atmospherics: Heavy rain, splashing water droplets frozen in mid-air, and rising steam from city manholes.

> CAMERA & TECHNICAL
Shot Size: Medium tracking shot with a slight Dutch Angle (tilted) to enhance the feeling of speed.
Composition & Leading Lines: The receding lines of the alleyway walls and the wet tire tracks on the ground create a "vanishing point" that frames the character's torso.
Lens Characteristics: 50mm lens, fast shutter speed to freeze the motion of the water, cinematic digital noise (ARRI Raw look).
[[/IMAGE PROMPT]]
[[/STAGING]]

Steady tracking shot maintaining a consistent distance as the tactical man runs toward the camera. he glances over his shoulder with a determined yet panicked expression. the camera then smoothly transitions into a god’s eye view, making the character look small against the vast, rain-slicked urban landscape. Finally, the scene cuts to a medium close-up of his face as he continues to run. Audio features the rhythmic metallic clinking of his tactical vest and his ragged, heavy breathing.

VII. [007] SH009

[[STAGING]]
[[IMAGE PROMPT]]
Create a cinematic film still depicting a professional diver preparing for a dangerous descent into an underwater abyss. The goal is to establish a visual tone of claustrophobia and professional focus.

Analyze the provided reference image and extract the primary visual anchors, such as character identity, hair texture, and facial structure. Use your reasoning capabilities to intelligently adapt these elements to the scenario described above, ensuring that physical continuity is maintained while seamlessly integrating the subject into the new context, including appropriate specialized equipment.

Follow these specific parameters to finalize the scene:
Shot Type: Tight medium shot, slightly low angle.
Composition: Subject slightly off-center, framed by the dark circular opening of a submarine hatch.
Environmental Details: Heavy metal textures, condensation on the glass of a diving helmet, glowing control panels in the background.
Lighting & Color: Deep blue ambient lighting with sharp red emergency strobes; harsh shadows across the subject's face.
Camera Aesthetic: Shot on 35mm film, anamorphic squeeze, realistic water particles and heavy grain. No photography gear visible in the frame.
[[/IMAGE PROMPT]]
[[/STAGING]]

The scene begins with the industrial control panels and red alarm lights behind the diver strobes erratically. The diver starts to look back at the malfunctioning equipment, then suddenly freezes as a massive, muffled thud vibrates through the pressure hull. He snaps his head forward, staring wide-eyed through his glass visor. The camera performs a smooth orbital wrap, moving from a close-up of his face to a position behind his shoulder, revealing his silhouette against the dark porthole. SFX: Thick, rhythmic inhalation and exhalation inside the helmet; the sharp crackle of short-circuiting electronics; a heavy, echoing external impact.

VIII. [008] SH011

[[STAGING]]
[[IMAGE PROMPT]]
Create a powerful, evocative cinematic photograph set on a rugged Indonesian coastline, depicting the stage of Bargaining.

Apply the facial identity from the reference image to the protagonist. Project the character’s physical likeness onto a full-body figure that matches the scale and perspective of the environment. Synthesize all missing clothing and anatomy to align with the cinematic lighting and world-logic described below.

Follow the detailed visual breakdown below:

> SUBJECT & ACTION
Character: Wearing a rain-soaked, white linen Koko shirt and a dark sarong tied around the waist.
Movement: Kneeling on the wet sand at the very edge of a crashing tide, hands outstretched toward the horizon.
Expression: Desperate, lips moving in a silent plea, eyes searching the sky.
Interaction: He is physically battling the elements, his knees sinking into the black volcanic sand as the massive waves threaten to pull him in.

> SPATIAL LAYOUT (DEPTH)
Foreground: Sharp, black volcanic rocks and swirling white sea foam rushing toward the lens.
Middle Ground: The protagonist, appearing small against the vertical scale of the rising tide.
Background: A massive, towering cliffside (reminiscent of Uluwatu) and a dark, turbulent sky occupying two-thirds of the frame as negative space.

> LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE
Key Light: Blue-hour twilight providing a cold, desaturated light across the scene.
Ambient/Fill: Harsh white foam of the waves providing the only bright highlights.
Atmospherics: Heavy sea spray, mist, and a violent storm brewing on the horizon.

> CAMERA & TECHNICAL
Shot Size: Extreme low-angle shot, looking up at the character and the cliffs to create a sense of overwhelming scale.
Lens Characteristics: 14mm ultra-wide lens, creating a sense of epic, grandiose isolation.
Texture: High-grain cinematic film stock, high contrast, cold color grade.
[[/IMAGE PROMPT]]
[[/STAGING]]

Starting from the kneeling position, the camera performs a smooth jib shot rising into a high angle. Intense wind creates violent secondary motion on the character's clothing. The man slowly prostrates himself, bringing his hands to his head in despair; then, he reaches down to clutch a handful of wet sand. Simultaneously, the camera performs a fast tracking-in move, dropping sharply to an extreme low-angle macro shot of his head. Audio: Deep, irregular heaving of the chest, the gritty crunch of sand being squeezed, and the sharp whistle of wind against the cliffs.

IX. [009] SH017

[[STAGING]]
[[IMAGE PROMPT]]
A grandiose and cold cinematic wide-shot from a high-altitude drone perspective, looking down at a lone figure sitting in the center of a massive, rain-stained concrete plaza in Jakarta. The architecture is monumental and brutalist, with giant grey shadows stretching across the floor. The scene is nearly monochromatic, dominated by shades of slate and ash, capturing a soul-crushing sense of isolation and the weight of depression.

Apply the facial identity from the reference image to the protagonist. Project his physical likeness onto a full-body figure that appears small and fragile from this high-altitude perspective. Synthesize his attire into a simple, dark-grey linen Koko shirt and trousers.

Follow the detailed visual breakdown below:

> SUBJECT & ACTION
Character: Seen from directly above, the top of his head and shoulders are the focus.
Movement: Curled into a fetal position or sitting slumped on the cold concrete.
Expression: Hidden from this angle, emphasizing his loss of identity.
Interaction: He is a tiny dark speck in an ocean of grey, unmoving concrete.

> SPATIAL LAYOUT (DEPTH)
Foreground: Nothing; the camera is floating high above, creating a sense of vertigo.
Middle Ground: The protagonist sitting at the bottom-third of the frame, surrounded by vast, empty floor space.
Background: The massive, towering geometric shadows of a Brutalist government building stretching toward the top of the frame.

> LIGHTING & ATMOSPHERE
Key Light: Flat, overcast midday light that removes all highlights, creating a "dead" visual tone.
Ambient/Fill: Uniform grey shadows with no warmth.
Atmospherics: A thin, low-hanging city smog that desaturates all colors.

> CAMERA & TECHNICAL
Shot Size: Extreme Wide / Bird's Eye View.
Lens Characteristics: 18mm wide-angle lens, maintaining perfect top-down geometric symmetry.
Texture: Digital cinema (Alexa 65), ultra-clean, sharp architectural details, clinical and cold.
[[/IMAGE PROMPT]]
[[/STAGING]]

[Robert] [Image] A disorienting cinematic sequence opens with an extreme high-angle crane shot, slowly pushing in on a lone figure lying on desolate brutalist concrete, the frame subtly rotating amidst a silent, echoing environment with a faint, distant hum. At the 2-second mark, a quick cut reveals a tight close-up as the character's eyes snap open with an abrupt, desperate gasp, their head still on the cold ground. Immediately, a slow reverse tracking shot pulls back as the character disorientedly pushes into a seated position, clutching their head, uttering "Where am I?" in a weak, confused voice. The scene then cuts to an extreme high-angle wide shot, mirroring the opening, as the character slowly rises to their feet. Finally, a medium-long cowboy shot executes a slow, sweeping arc around the now-standing character, starkly revealing the vast, isolating brutalist architecture, as the oppressive silence returns to amplify their profound disorientation.
